{{Quote|This is Star Destroyer ''Vengeance'' to all escort craft. We are entering high orbit.|''Vengeance'' commander on arrival at Sulon|audio=SDVengeance-DFSftE.flac|<ref name="Aud" />}}
The '''''Vengeance''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial'']][[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|-class Star Destroyer]] belonging to the [[High Inquisitor]] [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec]].

==History==
[[File:Vengeance-Datar.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The ''Vengeance'' under [[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]] [[Slenn]].]]
During the [[Attack at Datar]], the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] was at the disposal of [[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]] [[Slenn]].<ref name="Greedo" /> A unit under the command of [[Nahdonnis Praji]] was assigned to serve aboard the ''Vengeance'' and sent to sever [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] supply networks on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].<ref name="Praji">{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/source/praji/20090205.html|text=Tinker, Tailor, Soldier, Praji|int=Tinker, Tailor, Soldier, Praji}}</ref> During this battle, Slenn accidentally tipped off the Rebels about the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] attack, causing them to fight to the last man. [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], displeased at not being able to capture any of the Rebels alive, [[Death/Legends|executed]] Vice Admiral Slenn for his oversight. The ''Vengeance'' later participated in the [[Battle of Nar Shaddaa (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Nar Shaddaa]].<ref name="Greedo" />

The ''Vengeance'' later belonged to the [[High Inquisitor]] [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec]], with [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo|Thrawn]] having been dispatched by [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] to both assist him and command the vessel.<ref name="The Dark Forces Saga Part 3">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20050616a|series=The Dark Forces Saga|text=Part 6: Outcasts and Megalomaniacs Welcome}}</ref> The [[Chiss]] [[Imperial officer/Legends|officer]] was frequently assigned to the ''Vengeance'' as a means to keep the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] in check, as the [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] was fully aware of the natue of his servant's true ambitions.<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Characters" /> Some of the Imperial personnel, fed with [[humanocentrism|humanocentric]] propaganda, were uneasy serving under a blue-skinned [[alien/Legends|alien]] and a seemingly blind "walking skeleton".<ref name="Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire audio drama">[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire'' audio drama]]</ref> Under Jerec and Thrawn, the ''Vengeance'' led the violent [[Subjugation of Sulon|campaigns]] to bring [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]] under [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] control, unleashing the [[Ghost Battalion]] and other [[Imperial Special Operations]] forces. The local Rebel leader [[Morgan Katarn]], for whom Jerec was interested personally, was brought captive there; he was executed by Jerec after refusing to join him as his apprentice.<ref name="soldier">''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]''</ref>

Although this ship was destroyed by the monster [[Spore]], Jerec managed to salvage its computer core and transfer it to a new [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]], ''[[Vengeance II]]''. After ceding the ''Vengeance II'' to [[Death Squadron/Legends|Death Squadron]], the personal [[Flotilla/Legends|flotilla]] of his primary rival, Lord Vader, recently ordained by the Emperor as [[Supreme Commander (Galactic Empire)/Legends|Supreme Commander]],<ref name="kenner">{{KennerCite|set=Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (toy line)|pack=Darth Vader vs. Prince Xizor|link=soteKxizor-vader.asp}}</ref> the [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitor]] Jerec renamed his final [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] ''[[Vengeance (Vengeance-class)|Vengeance]]'' as well, seemingly loath to depart from the name of his old Star Destroyer.<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Characters" /><ref name="The Dark Forces Saga Part 6">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20050616a|series=The Dark Forces Saga|text=Part 6: Outcasts and Megalomaniacs Welcome}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
According to ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', the ''Vengeance'' that attacked the Rebels on Nar Shaddaa is the same as the one under the command of Jerec in pursuit of Spore.<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|III|301|''Vengeance''}}</ref>

''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' clearly establishes that [[Imperial Advisor/Legends|Advisor]] [[Bregius Golthan|Golthan's]] [[Vengeance (Golthan)|''Vengeance'']] is a different Star Destroyer than Jerec's ''Vengeance''.<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref>
